title: The Big Data Analytics Pipeline for Book Data
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential process of extracting insights from a large collection of digital books using big data analytics techniques.
elements: Raw Book Data Sources (e-books, online libraries, reviews)
Analytical Processing (NLP, Sentiment Analysis, Topic Modeling)
relationships: Data flows sequentially from Sources to Ingestion, then to Processing, then to Analytical Processing, and finally produces Insights
